findings.title: EU-US Turnberry tariff deal locks in 15% rate on EU exports
findings.summary: European Parliament endorsed Turnberry deal fixing US tariffs on EU exports at 15%, shifting drag on EU-US trade from uncertainty to competitiveness loss vs China/India. EU export growth to US projected to slow 4.6% in 2026 due to higher stable tariffs and eroded relative position. Reduces policy volatility but intensifies structural trade friction.
findings.claim_excerpt: Fixing tariffs at 15% should reduce trade policy uncertainty... EU export growth to the US is expected to slow further by around 4.6% in 2026 due to tariffs alone.
findings.signal_type_basis: Medium-term trade flow impairment from stable high tariffs, per protocol upgrade for trade volume indicators under active tariff shock.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Stabilizes tariff regime at elevated level, upgrading EU-US friction from episodic to conditional drag on global trade and EM exporters.
findings.confidence_basis: Multiple sources confirm Turnberry endorsement and 15% fixation with consistent impact projections.

sources_cited.excerpt: Turnberry deal locks in a 15% tariff rate for EU exports
2025-2026 reciprocal tariff regime has introduced a new framework that further escalates duties

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Corroborated by financial analysis and consulting reports on regime shift to stable 15% rate.

cross_monitor_relevance.esa: Elevates European fiscal autonomy needs amid stable trade coercion
cross_monitor_relevance.scem: Pressures EM exporters via relative competitiveness erosion

findings.review_reason: Assess ratification progress and initial trade flow impacts

findings.title: US launches probe into EU industrial overcapacity, denies unfair practices
findings.summary: US opened investigations into EU excess production post-Supreme Court ruling invalidating 2025 tariffs, imposing new 10% duties on top of prior 4.8%. EU Commission rejected claims, noting 7% of exports now exceed 15% cap. Signals potential further escalation in Section 301-style actions.
findings.claim_excerpt: Washington launched fresh trade investigations targeting the EU... imposed new tariffs of 10% following the court ruling.
findings.signal_type_basis: Episodic probe and duty imposition without sustained retaliation or WTO filing yet.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Revives tariff coercion post-legal setback, testing EU response in overcapacity narrative.
findings.confidence_basis: Direct reports from EU Commission response and US action details.

sources_cited.excerpt: US opens new probe... Commission denies unfair trade practices
US actively pushes back on nonmarket economy policies... increased pressure from overcapacity

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Cross-confirmed by think tank analysis of post-ruling US strategy.

cross_monitor_relevance.esa: Heightens EU industrial policy tensions with US

findings.review_reason: Monitor for duty enactment and EU countermeasures

findings.title: USTR releases 2026 Trade Policy Agenda doubling down on America First
findings.summary: USTR agenda emphasizes enforcing existing agreements, pursuing new ARTs, and combating duty evasion amid record EU trade deficit overtaking China. Signals sustained protectionism into 2026 with focus on domestic producers. No major new tariff announcements but reinforces monitoring of implementation.
findings.claim_excerpt: The Trump Administration is going to double down on the America First Trade Policy in 2026... USTR will closely monitor implementation.
findings.signal_type_basis: Regime-level affirmation of tariff shock protocol embedding protectionism for years.
findings.preliminary_assessment: Cements structural US trade reorientation, baseline for ongoing escalation risks.
findings.confidence_basis: Official USTR document with deficit data corroborated by secondary sources.

sources_cited.excerpt: Double down on America First Trade Policy in 2026
EU-US trade relations in 2026 reflect a fundamental shift

research_traceback.analyst_confidence_notes: Primary gov source aligned with trade analysis.

findings.review_reason: Track ART implementations and enforcement actions
